title: Set up Framer Motion for animations and page transitions
summary: Install framer-motion, add motion components, implement enter/exit animations with AnimatePresence, and set up page transitions in Next.js App Router.
declaration: I will set up Framer Motion for animations. This includes installing the library, creating animated components with `motion.*`, adding enter/exit animations using `AnimatePresence`, and implementing page transitions for Next.js App Router. Framer Motion requires client components — I will structure the code accordingly.
